creator: sheldonh@uunet.co.za
text:
The xzx port's DESCR file does not include the package's home
	page URL. Adding it would make it easier for folks to find
	snapshots to use in conjunction with the emulator.

Fix: The following diff adds a home page URL field to the xzx port's
	package description file.
How-To-Repeat: 
	N/A
